name: Checklist Progress Bar

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# Release Notes

## v1.0.0 — Initial Release

### What's New

This is the first public release of **Checklist Progress Bar** for Obsidian.

**Progress Bar Callout**
- Add `> [!progress]` above any checklist block to display a live progress bar
- The bar updates automatically as you check and uncheck items — no save or reload required
- Displays filled (`█`) and empty (`░`) segments alongside a `checked/total (%)` count

**Checklist Detection**
- Automatically detects standard Obsidian checklist syntax (`- [ ]` and `- [x]`)
- Supports nested checklist items at any indentation level
- Multiple progress bars per note, each independently tracking its own block

**Styling**
- Custom callout design with dark and light theme support
- Monospace font rendering for a clean, aligned bar appearance
- Minimal and unobtrusive — fits naturally alongside your existing notes

---

*Thanks for trying out Checklist Progress Bar. Feedback and contributions are welcome via GitHub (https://github.com/profesr-chaos/obsidian-checklist-progress-bar).*
